Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Penance arrow]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — A Penance arrow slammed into the Abidan panel of blue light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — The Penance arrow vanished but was replaced by a volley of bone arrows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — The Penance arrow thundered through space and Fate at Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon nocked a Penance arrow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — A Penance arrow can cause a sensation of death upon touch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The power of the Penance arrow numbed Ziel's hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The Penance arrow was accelerated by a circle of force and time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — The touch of a Penance arrow scrapes at the user's lifeline.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
